subcodes.first_line: O Na'im, thou art ever-present in 'Abdu'l-Bahá's heart and mind; never absent is thy remembrance, nor forgotten thy mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نعیم عبدالبهاء همواره در قلب حاضری و در خاطری از یادت فراغتی نه و از ذکرت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
